entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Eh. Makarantu za su iya fara amfani da samfurin jama'a, sannan su tattauna wuraren koyon AI na musamman tare da tsarin aiki na makaranta, sirri, da zabukan samun dama da aka dauki nauyi.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Yes. cibiyoyin fanni suna shafukan jama’a an gina don masu koyo, Google, da injinan amsar AI. su expose only na jama’a learning guidance da na jama’a yanayin baƙo URLs, not hirarrakin sirri da aka adana.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. malamai da makaranta leaders za su iya amfani da the na jama’a dakin karatun saƙonni don tantance learning behaviors kafin discussing a tailored makaranta tura aiki.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Yes. dakin karatun jagorori hanyoyi zuwa yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a such as koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, lissafi mataki koci, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da na tarihi conversations.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Yes. na tarihi person mode shi ne a learning kwaikwayo don perspective da questioning. It bai kamata ya be cited as an authenticated quotation.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Yes. linked na jama’a yanayoyin koyo bude a cikin yanayin baƙo, don haka masu koyo can gwada explanations, Socratic tambayoyi, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da ƙarin ba tare da farawa daga a marketing shafi.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Eh. An tsara yanayin koyon bako na jama'a don samun dama kyauta, don masu koyo su iya farawa ba tare da bukatar girke-girken makaranta ko asusun biya ba.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a da masu amfani shafuka suna designed don haka iyaye can bincika the learning hali kafin relying a kan it.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a let makaranta leaders da malamai gwada the learning experience kafin discussing a tailored makaranta tura aiki.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a aikin gida koci shi ne available at /chat/homework-coach, da this cibiyar fanni hanyoyi don the supporting modes da jagorori.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Yes. recommended amfani da shi ne alamomi, explanations, mataki bincike, martani, da bita saƙonni rather fiye da final amsoshi kai cannot bayyana.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Yes. amfani da tafiyar lokaci don mahaɗi, tarihi Cause da Effect don hujja structure, muhawara don hujjojin adawa, da tushe mai suka don shaida iyaka.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Kai suna solely responsible don naka conduct da any bayanai, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, sauti da bidiyo clips, hanyoyi ("abun ciki") that kai submit, post, da display a kan the inspir dandali. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected bayanai don various purposes: don provide da maintain namu Service don notify kai game da canje-canje don namu Service don allow kai don participate a cikin interactive features na namu Service lokacin da kai zaɓi don do don haka don provide customer tallafi don gather bincike ko valuable information don haka that mu can inganta namu Service don monitor the usage na namu Service don detect, prevent da address technical issues don fulfil any other purpose don wacce kai provide it don carry out namu wajibai da enforce namu haƙƙoƙi arising daga any contracts entered zuwa between kai da mu, including don billing da collection don provide kai tare da notices game da naka asusu da/or biyan kuɗi, including expiration da renewal notices, email-instructions, etc don provide kai tare da news, special offers da general information game da other goods, services da events wacce mu offer that suna similar don those that kai have already purchased ko enquired game da unless kai have opted not don receive such information a cikin any other way mu na iya describe lokacin da kai provide the information don any other purpose tare da naka consent

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Kai can also fara tare da a rough version na naka real problem. Wani messy farko saƙo shi ne fine. zama can clarify the mataki, masu amfani, wa’adi, da salo once kai begin.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Kai can contact namu haƙƙa cikin mallaka Agent via email at support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Kai can gwada the format a cikin Talk don a na tarihi Person. If kai want the wider yanayi kafin meeting a person, amfani da tafiyar lokaci don visit a period, bincika constraints, da sannan tambaya abin da choices people actually had.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Kai know a Socratic malamin AI worked lokacin da the mai koyo can do three things:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Kai na iya provide mu either directly at support@inspir.app ko via third party sites da kayan aiki tare da information da martani concerning errors, suggestions don improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, da other yana da muhimmanci mai alaƙa don namu Service (“martani”). kai acknowledge da agree that: (i) kai shall not retain, acquire ko assert any dukiyar basira daidai ko other daidai, title ko interest a cikin ko don the martani; (ii) Company na iya have development ideas similar don the martani; (iii) martani ba ya contain confidential information ko proprietary information daga kai ko any third party; da (iv) Company ba under any obligation na sirri tare da respect don the martani. a cikin the event the transfer na the ownership don the martani ba possible due don applicable mandatory laws, kai grant Company da its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, kyauta-na-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited da perpetual daidai don amfani da (including kwafe, modify, ƙirƙiri derivative works, publish, distribute da commercialize) martani a cikin any manner da don any purpose.

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Naka information, including bayanan sirri, na iya be transferred don – da maintained a kan – computers located outside na naka state, province, country ko other governmental jurisdiction inda the bayanai protection laws na iya differ daga those na naka jurisdiction. If kai suna located outside India da zaɓi don provide information don mu, please bayani that mu transfer the bayanai, including bayanan sirri, don India da process it there. naka consent don this manufar sirri followed ta naka submission na such information represents naka yarjejeniya don that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) zai take all the matakai reasonably necessary don ensure that naka bayanai shi ne treated securely da a cikin accordance tare da this manufar sirri da no transfer na naka bayanan sirri zai take place don an organisation ko a country unless there suna adequate kulawa a cikin place including the tsaro na naka bayanai da other bayanan sirri.
